# Knot — product context for AI page agents

Knot is a Loom-style async video platform.

## Main areas
- /dashboard — overview of recent folders and videos
- /dashboard/videos — video library (create, edit, share, delete, watch)
- /dashboard/folders — nested folders
- /dashboard/notifications — COMMENT, MENTION, RECORDING_READY, VIDEO_SHARED
- /dashboard/settings — Clerk account profile
- /watch/{id} — progressive playback, comments, share, embed
- /r/{slug} — short share link (access-checked)
- /embed/{id} — PUBLIC-only iframe player

## Desktop recording
Users record with the Electron desktop app. Chunks upload through the Next.js API to Backblaze B2. Desktop sessions default to Public visibility for live share links.

## Helpful controls
Prefer elements with data-knot attributes:
- data-knot="create-video"
- data-knot="create-folder"
- data-knot="mark-all-read"
- data-knot="sidebar-trigger"
- data-knot="page-agent-launcher"

## Safety
Ask before deleting videos or folders. Do not invent admin APIs.
